title: Smoky Hash Italian Frittata
description: A simple and flavorful Italian-style omelette made with smoky hash browns and a hint of floral herbs.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, salt, and pepper.
Add the chopped parsley to the eggs and stir to combine.
In a large skillet, heat the flaky and smoky hash over medium heat.
Once the hash is heated through, pour in the egg mixture.
Cook the eggs for about 2-3 minutes, until the edges start to set.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the eggs are set and the frittata is golden brown.
Remove the skillet from the oven and sprinkle the grated parmesan over the top.
Return the skillet to the oven for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Use a spatula to carefully loosen the edges of the frittata from the skillet.
Slide the frittata out of the skillet onto a plate and serve hot.
